title: Limited World Helper
description: This Mod adds craftings and trades to Minecraft for those who play in structureless superflat and/or skyblock!
body:
This mod adds items, craftings and special trades for those who play in limited worlds such as; "No Structure Super flat" or Sky block.

## **_What's New?_**

- Expert Toolsmiths now can trade for lava

- You can now turn cobblestone into gravel and gravel into sand with Obsidian Shards

- Obsidian Shards can be crafted into a block of obsidian.

- Master level Armor Smiths now have chance to trade for diamonds

- The newly added Infuser block can be used to make endstones.

- You can use endstones to craft end portal gates.
